name: kegg-mcp-server
description: Query the KEGG bioinformatics database (pathways, genes, compounds, drugs, and more) from Claude via the public KEGG REST API.
long_description: Read-only MCP server for the KEGG REST API. Exposes 33 tools across 12 categories (pathways, genes, compounds, reactions, enzymes, diseases, drugs, modules, orthology, glycans, BRITE hierarchies, cross-database lookup) plus 8 URI resource templates and 3 guided bioinformatics prompts. Every tool is marked readOnly+idempotent. Responses are structured Pydantic JSON with a summary/full detail switch to keep context usage small. The KEGG REST API is free and unauthenticated — no keys required.

tools.name: get_pathway_info
tools.description: Detailed info for a pathway (summary or full).

tools.name: search_genes
tools.description: Search for genes in a KEGG organism.

tools.name: get_gene_info
tools.description: Detailed info for a gene entry.

tools.name: search_enzymes
tools.description: Search KEGG enzymes by EC number or name.

tools.name: get_disease_info
tools.description: Detailed info for a disease entry.

tools.name: get_ko_info
tools.description: Detailed info for a KO entry.

tools.name: get_brite_info
tools.description: Detailed info for a BRITE entry.

tools.name: batch_entry_lookup
tools.description: Fetch multiple KEGG entries in bulk (max 50).

tools.name: convert_identifiers
tools.description: Convert IDs between KEGG and external databases.

prompts.name: pathway_enrichment_analysis
prompts.description: Guided KEGG pathway enrichment for a gene list.
prompts.text: Analyze a gene list against KEGG pathways: map each gene to a KEGG ID in the target organism, aggregate pathway associations, identify the most frequent pathways, describe their biological function, and summarize enrichment.

prompts.name: drug_target_investigation
prompts.description: Drug targets, pathways, and interactions walkthrough.
prompts.text: Investigate a drug in KEGG: find its entry, retrieve targets and classification, explore each target's function and pathways, and screen for drug-drug interactions. Produce a mechanism-of-action summary.

prompts.name: metabolic_pathway_comparison
prompts.text: Compare a reference metabolic pathway across several KEGG organism codes: pull organism-specific pathway entries, list genes and compounds per species, identify conserved vs species-specific elements, and summarize evolutionary conservation.

logLevel.title: Log level
logLevel.description: Verbosity of structured JSON logs written to stderr.
